props.name: animation
props.description: Adds a fade transition animation to the React Popover.

props.name: className
props.description: Custom class name(s) for additional styling.

props.name: container
props.type: Element | DocumentFragment | (() => Element | DocumentFragment | null) | null | undefined
props.description:
Defines the container element to which the React Popover is appended.
Accepts:
- A DOM element (`HTMLElement` or `DocumentFragment`)
- A function that returns a single element
- `null` (defaults to `document.body`)

props.name: content
props.description: Main content of the React Popover. It can be a string or any valid React node.

props.name: delay
props.type: number | { show: number; hide: number; } | undefined
props.description:
Delay (in milliseconds) before showing or hiding the React Popover.
- If a number is provided, that delay applies to both "show" and "hide".
- If an object is provided, use separate values for "show" and "hide".

props.name: fallbackPlacements
props.description: Specifies the fallback placements when the preferred `placement` cannot be met.

props.name: offset
props.description: Offset of the React Popover relative to its toggle element, in the form `[x, y]`.

props.name: onHide
props.description: Invoked when the React Popover is about to hide.

props.name: onShow
props.description: Invoked when the React Popover is about to show.

props.name: placement
props.description: Placement of the React Popover. Popper.js may override this based on available space.

props.name: popperConfig
props.description:
Allows customization of the Popper.js configuration for the React Popover.
Can be an object or a function returning a modified configuration.
[Learn more](https://popper.js.org/docs/v2/constructors/#options)

props.name: title
props.description: Title for the React Popover header. Can be a string or any valid React node.

props.name: trigger
props.description: Determines which events trigger the visibility of the React Popover. Can be a single trigger or an array of triggers.

props.name: visible
props.description:
Controls the visibility of the React Popover.
- `true` shows the popover.
- `false` hides the popover.
